pageContext.name: Charlotte Katakuri (Duel Memories)
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Charlotte Katakuri (Duel Memories) Statue!   This statue of the Charlotte family's skilled fighter was expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Charlotte Katakuri from the hit anime One Piece. Standing at approximately 3.9' tall, Charlotte Katakuri is seen striking a powerful and dynamic pose.  One Piece fans, be sure to enhance your collection with the Charlotte Katakuri statue today!
